message:
chore(deps): bump proptest 1.10.0 → 1.11.0

Minor-level bump of the proptest property-testing harness in
fp-conformance and fp-frankentui dev-dependencies. Cargo.lock already
at 1.11.0 transitively.

Verification:
- `rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets` → OK
- `rch exec -- cargo test -p fp-conformance --lib` → 334 passed,
  18 failed (same pre-existing env-dependent failures as baseline;
  unchanged by proptest bump).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
